## pi-pipe package

Library-first entrypoint for pi-pipe.

Use `new PiPipe()` to embed the server programmatically, or use the `pi-pipe` binary for the default as-is server.

## Classes

<table><thead><tr><th>

Class

</th><th>

Description

</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

[PiPipe](./pi-pipe.pipipe.md)

</td><td>

Library-first wrapper around `uWebSockets.js` that exposes a built-in Pi RPC route and lets callers add their own HTTP and WebSocket handlers.

</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
